prompt: Create a full-body ultra-realistic studio portrait using the uploaded photo as the exact face reference. Preserve the person’s face Identity with no modifications to facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, cheeks, jawline, skin tone, hairstyle, or bangs. Keep the expression natural and cute. Place the person in a clean light gray seamless studio background. She is standing in a playful pose with one leg lifted slightly behind her, smiling naturally while holding a colorful rainbow lollipop in . Add a pastel blue crossbody bag with a small Winnie the Pooh keychain hanging from it. Keep her hair exactly as in the original photo. Beside her, create a cute chibi illustration version of the same person with identical hairstyle and bangs, wearing the same outfit and blue bag. The chibi is playfully pulling the hem of her skirt while smiling mischievously. Add hand-drawn black doodles around both characters, including motion lines, excitement marks, tiny sparkles, and playful accents. The overall style should combine a realistic fashion studio photograph with a kawaii hand-drawn illustration. Bright, soft lighting, clean composition, adorable, cheerful, modern Korean-inspired aesthetic, ultra detailed, high resolution, premium quality.
